---
title: "Capstone6"
format: html
---

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Essential libraries
# install.packages("caret")
# install.packages("glmnet")
# install.packages("ranger")
# install.packages("iml")
# install.packages("slider")
# install.packages("kableExtra")
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(arrow)
library(tidymodels)
library(yardstick)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(caret)
library(recipes)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(ranger)
library(iml)
library(knitr)
library(slider)
library(fixest)
library(kableExtra)
```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat_main_eps <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_main_eps.rds"))

# ---------- helper: weighted mean ----------
wmean <- function(x, w) {
  ok <- !is.na(x) & !is.na(w)
  if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
  weighted.mean(x[ok], w[ok])
}

# ---------- helper: summary stats function ----------
make_sumstats <- function(df, wvar = "EARNWT_adj") {
  w <- df[[wvar]]

  tibble(
    `Weekly hours` = wmean(df$UHRSWORKORG, w),
    `Hourly wage`  = wmean(df$HOURWAGE, w),
    `Age`          = wmean(df$AGE, w),
    `Share bound`  = wmean(as.numeric(df$bound_eps == 1), w),
    `Share treated`= wmean(as.numeric(df$treated == 1), w),
    `N (unweighted)` = nrow(df),
    `N (weighted)`   = sum(w, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# ---------- 0) output folder ----------
out_dir <- here("tables")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---------- 1) Final sample counts table ----------

final_counts <- dat_main_eps %>%
  summarise(
    `Observations (unweighted)` = n(),
    `Observations (weighted)`   = sum(EARNWT_adj, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Events`  = n_distinct(event_id),
    `States`  = n_distinct(STATEFIP),
    `Treated obs (unweighted)`  = sum(treated == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Control obs (unweighted)`  = sum(treated == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Treated obs (weighted)`    = sum(EARNWT_adj[treated == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
    `Control obs (weighted)`    = sum(EARNWT_adj[treated == 0], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Statistic") %>%
  rename(Value = V1) %>%
  mutate(
    Value = formatC(Value, format = "f", big.mark = ",", digits = 0)
  )

counts_tex <- final_counts %>%
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    longtable = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Statistic", "Value"),
    align = c("l", "r"),
    caption = "Final Sample Counts"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position"),
    font_size = 10
  )

save_kable(counts_tex, file = file.path(out_dir, "table_counts.tex"))

# ---------- 2) Table 1: Summary Statistics ----------

# Panel A: full sample only (single row, no extra panel column)
panelA <- make_sumstats(dat_main_eps) %>%
  mutate(Group = "Full sample") %>%
  select(Group, everything())

# Panel B: Bound vs Non-bound
panelB <- dat_main_eps %>%
  mutate(Group = ifelse(bound_eps == 1, "Bound", "Non-bound")) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  group_modify(~ make_sumstats(.x)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Group, everything())

# Combine the two panels, keeping Panel A first
tab1 <- bind_rows(panelA, panelB)

# Round and format numeric values
tab1_fmt <- tab1 %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(`Weekly hours`, `Hourly wage`, `Age`, `Share bound`, `Share treated`),
           ~ sprintf("%.3f", round(.x, 3))),
    `N (unweighted)` = formatC(`N (unweighted)`, format = "f", big.mark = ",", digits = 0),
    `N (weighted)`   = formatC(`N (weighted)`,   format = "f", big.mark = ",", digits = 0)
  )

# Build the LaTeX table
tab1_tex <- tab1_fmt %>%
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    longtable = FALSE,
    align = "lrrrrrrrr",  # 1 Group column plus 7 statistics columns
    caption = "Summary Statistics",
    col.names = c("Group", "Weekly hours", "Hourly wage", "Age",
                  "Share bound", "Share treated",
                  "N (unweighted)", "N (weighted)")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 9
  ) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel A: Full sample", 1, 1, bold = TRUE) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel B: By bound status", 2, nrow(tab1_fmt), bold = TRUE)

save_kable(tab1_tex, file = file.path(out_dir, "table1_sumstats.tex"))

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
#dat_main_eps <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_main_eps.rds"))

# Update these if your actual variable names differ
pre_wage_var <- "w_pre"     # Replace if the pre-policy wage variable has a different name
mw_base_var  <- "mw_base"   # Replace if the baseline minimum-wage variable has a different name

plot_df <- dat_main_eps %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(.data[[pre_wage_var]]),
    !is.na(.data[[mw_base_var]]),
    !is.na(bound_eps),
    !is.na(EARNWT_adj)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    wage_gap = .data[[pre_wage_var]] - .data[[mw_base_var]],
    bound_label = if_else(bound_eps == 1, "Bound", "Non-bound")
  )

p_wage_dist <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = wage_gap, weight = EARNWT_adj, fill = bound_label)) +
  geom_histogram(
    aes(y = after_stat(density)),
    bins = 60,
    position = "identity",
    alpha = 0.6,
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Pre-policy wage relative to baseline minimum wage (US dollars)",
    y = "Weighted density",
    title = "Distribution of pre-policy wages by bound status",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

p_wage_dist

ggsave(
  here("tables", "fig_wage_distribution_bound_status.png"),
  p_wage_dist,
  width = 8, height = 5.5, dpi = 300
)

p_wage_density <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = wage_gap, weight = EARNWT_adj, fill = bound_label)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.35, adjust = 1.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Pre-policy wage relative to baseline minimum wage (US dollars)",
    y = "Weighted density",
    title = "Pre-Policy Wage Distribution and Bound Classification",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

p_wage_density

ggsave(
  here("tables", "fig_wage_density_bound_status.png"),
  p_wage_density,
  width = 8, height = 5.5, dpi = 300
)
```
